title: QUILL Speech Project Profile
description: Per-project remembered speech settings, stored at <project>/.quill/speech-project.json. Carries the synthesizer, output format, chapterization, text normalization, and active pronunciation dictionaries so a folder of documents is configured once. See docs/planning/speech-project-format.md and §4.10 of docs/planning/batch-document-to-speech-plan.md.

synthesizer.description: The chosen TTS engine and its voice / pacing.

engine.description: Local synthesis engine. Cloud engines are excluded from batch (§2.3).

voice.description: Engine voice id/name (e.g. a SAPI voice token, a Kokoro voice, an eSpeak language).

speed.description: Speed multiplier for engines that use one (Kokoro).

extra.description: Engine-specific keys. Recognised: piper_executable, piper_model, dectalk_executable, dectalk_dictionary, espeak_executable. Values are paths/strings.

format.description: wav (always available) or mp3 (requires ffmpeg; falls back to wav with a note).

skip_existing.description: Skip a file whose output already exists, so a re-run resumes cheaply.

mode.description: none = one flat file; single = one file with MP3 chapter markers; separate = one file per article.

sound_enabled.description: Play a transition earcon at each article boundary; also emits a with-tones file variant.

sound_id.description: Sound-pack sound id for the transition earcon. "" = the bundled placeholder chime.

article_gap_ms.description: Silence inserted between articles, in milliseconds.

intro_section_title.description: Title for the lead-in section before the first heading (and for documents with no headings).

normalization.description: Serialized TextNormalizationOptions (§4.9). Empty object = recommended defaults. See quill/core/speech/text_normalize.py.

pronunciation.description: Active pronunciation dictionaries for the project (§4.7).

enabled.description: Master toggle for pronunciation correction in this project.

dictionaries.description: Ordered references to the dictionaries this project uses.

id.description: Dictionary id (the JSON file stem for quill-json dictionaries).

scope.description: global = app data dir; project = the project folder's .quill/pronunciation/.

format.description: Dictionary file format. quill-json is native; sapi-lexicon and csv are reserved for future importers.

path.description: For project scope: path relative to the project root. "" = resolve by id in the standard location.
